productDisplayName: Puma Men's Benecio Mid Leather Black White Shoe
description: There&rsquo s no keeping a low profile with these shoes from puma. The simple design and durable construction goes well with everything. These Benecio shoes come with a leather upper for instant style and durability, cushioned midsole for comfort and stability and rubber outsole for maximum traction - perfect for urban culture.UpperCrinkled-leather upper for style and comfortPadded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and snug FitLeather formstripe detail on the sidesMid ankle support for comfort to the lower legBrand name embossed on the heel guard and ankle for styleMidsoleBreathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort.TPU and EVA midsole combined to give you support and ample cushioningOutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole for maximum traction and grip
